R12 工地火圈重驗（段B ⑤ 孤兒樁修完＝重開·出廠預設必須為開）：先派工→敵: R12 construction sites under tower fire, re-verified (stage B ⑤, orphan stubs fixed = re-enabled; the factory default must be on): villagers dispatched first, enemy tower arrives after = the order is cancelled on the spot **and the stub is removed with it** (no refund, no kill credited, footprint released, the aiOutMax slot freed; a finished building is never removed); no tower = the order stands; ablation = back to the old sticky behaviour; tower already there = nobody is sent at all; tower falls = dispatch resumes automatically; an unscouted tower does not count (fog is fair); a villager on a suicide-gather stance still goes (the decision stays with the player); site selection checks the whole footprint (ablation reverts to checking the anchor tile only); the observation hook stays at 0 after the hot fix
\\n[106] 三兵團段甲（守／攻／備·2026-07-18·HANDOFF-: \n[106] three squads, stage A (defence / attack / reserve): the wave lifecycle (reserve reaches strength → must rally → forms up and sorties) + attackers do not retreat, with a T_back exception for defending home + modes (guard while marching, attack once inside the town) + folding g6/g7 + observation hooks (causal control + ablation)
三兵團段甲 波次生命週期：備兵到量→必集結(集結中·未出擊)→到齊成軍出擊(備兵: three squads stage A, wave lifecycle: reserve reaches strength → must rally (rallying, not yet sortied) → assembled, forms up and sorties (reserve → attacker); ablation AI_MUSTER=false = no rally, sortie on the spot (causal control)
三兵團段甲 攻兵不撤退+T_back：家門安全+強敵貼臉=不彈回(治窗口崩)·近: three squads stage A, attackers do not retreat + T_back: home safe + a strong enemy in its face = no bouncing back (fixes the collapsing window); near home + home in danger + not engaged = return to put the fire out; too far = press on (a race to trade bases); ablation AI_NORETREAT=false = it does not even come back for the fire (causal control)
三兵團段甲 模式切換+折疊+觀察：離目標遠=行軍守備(guard)·入城鎮群=攻: three squads stage A, mode switching + folding + observation: far from the target = guard while marching; inside the town = attack; boss always folds g6, and g7 waits without being maintained for nothing (the safety line); aiWaveObs complete; the same settings give the same decision (determinism)
\\n[107] 三兵團段乙（戰略層·2026-07-18·3SQUADS §3: \n[107] three squads, stage B (the strategic layer): target selection (difficulty rules, only what is honestly known, a stuck flag) + rally before arriving + fight what you meet on the march + diverting en route (Hard+) + T_back decided by being fired on + scouts wander randomly (causal control + ablation)
三兵團段乙 目標選擇（§3 表·誠實）：困難=已知最弱群(防禦加權+同弱取近)·: three squads stage B, target selection (honest): Hard = the weakest known cluster (defence-weighted, nearest among equals); Beginner = the opponent's main base; Normal = the nearest cluster by path; it attacks only what it knows (nothing sighted at all = null + the stuck flag; the target reappearing clears the flag); ablation = stage A's straight run at the town centre
三兵團段乙 抵達前必集結+行軍遇敵：散波入區=退站收攏不開打→成團=放行攻擊·消: three squads stage B, rally before arriving + fight what you meet: a scattered wave entering the area = fall back and close up rather than opening fire → assembled = cleared to attack; ablation = attack on entry (the old first-there-fights-first fault). Meeting an enemy on the march = fight in place; a scattered boss wave pulls back first (guard), closes up, then fights; ablation = no engagement along the way (causal control)
三兵團段乙 途中轉向+T_back對齊+斥候隨機走：困難途中遇群=改打該群(di: three squads stage B, diverting en route + T_back alignment + scouts wander: Hard meeting a cluster en route = switch to attacking it (divertN=1); Beginner and the ablation do not divert; being fired on = engaged, so no returning home (the ablation's proxy misreads it and returns); a scout that has covered the map = wanders randomly with unknown tiles preferred (ablation = the old distant-observation behaviour); determinism
\\n[108] 三兵團段丙（經濟配套·2026-07-18·3SQUADS §: \n[108] three squads, stage C (the economic support): 1:1 production capacity early on (milShare, research fully converted) + wave size scaling with the age (waveSz) + difficulty differentiation columns + renewables keeping up with villagers + outpost and tower spacing + patrols on a real route + a barracks at the outpost + upgrading to a city + a fixed research order (causal control + ablation)
三兵團段丙 產能1:1+波規模：經濟預留擋死世界＝額度內照出兵+軍費/建設記帳·: three squads stage C, 1:1 capacity + wave size: an economic reservation used to block the world dead = within its allowance units are still produced, with military spending and construction booked; allowance 0 or the ablation = the old yielding behaviour; Beginner blocks at 0.35 and Hard passes at 1 (production speed differentiates). Research line finished = capacity converts fully to units. Wave coefficient 0.55 → 1 → 1.5 with the age; smaller for Beginner; the ablation is always 1 (causal control)
三兵團段丙 再生跟上村民+開拓/塔間距：困難+上限=村民管理量·地圖上限之上仍補: three squads stage C, renewables keep up with villagers + outpost and tower spacing: Hard's cap = what the villagers can manage, and it keeps adding farms above the map cap (fixes idling); Normal stops at the map cap; the ablation adds none. An outpost under construction = no second one started (the ablation shows the old two-at-once fault); a mine inside the spacing radius = build a tower instead; the only legal spot violating tower spacing = refuse to build (the ablation builds anyway) (causal control)
三兵團段丙 巡邏真路線+拓點軍營+升都市+研發固定序：角度環路(4建築)+質心到: three squads stage C, patrols on a real route + a barracks at the outpost + upgrading to a city + a fixed research order: an angular loop over 4 buildings + advance from the centroid on arrival, throttled to 1s (the ablation shows the old index-spinning fault). Hard adds a barracks beside a distant outpost (Normal and the ablation do not); Normal upgrades to a city in the Castle age (Beginner and the ablation do not); U1 unresearched = U2 stays out of the line and hunger skips to the siege root (the ablation lets M1 jump the queue); determinism
\\n[109] 三兵團段丁（魔王進階·2026-07-18·3SQUADS §: \n[109] three squads, stage D (boss-tier extras): a fourth squad for raiding (g7, boss+; the feint and the raid are the same party) + civilisation reading keeping the squads path live (civRead/civSee) + cheat multipliers wired in (milCheat → sortie threshold, gather/tech) (causal control + ablation)
三兵團段丁 第四團產線：魔王+波本錢過主力安全線=養 g7(騎/槍弓)·本錢不足: three squads stage D, the fourth squad's production line: boss+ with wave funding above the main force's safety line = maintain g7 (cavalry / spear and bow); funding short = do not; Hard with d.harass=false = it does not apply (orthogonal); ablation AI_HARASS4=false = it stays folded (causal control)
三兵團段丁 第四團出擊/收隊：攻兵波在外=佯攻出門(attack)·窗口到=停損: three squads stage D, the fourth squad's sortie and withdrawal: the attack wave is out = the feint leaves the gate (attack); the window closes = cut losses and come home; no main engagement = no sortie; defences too hard = pure harassment (noBld, hunting people only); villagers nearby = go straight for them (focus)
三兵團段丁 文明判讀+作弊接線：表徵目擊→推定 mongol→配比 ctrW 真: three squads stage D, civilisation reading + cheat wiring: a tell is sighted → Mongol inferred → the ctrW mix really moves (civBlind control); at the god tier civSee knows from sighting any unit at all (boss does not, so its intelligence stays fair); milCheat pushes the sortie threshold up god > shura > boss; gather/tech take effect immediately; boss gets a declared gathering ×1.2; nothing is cheated below Hard; determinism
三兵團段丁 boss 稅四修（G1-2 probe 定罪後修）：桶樓地板只認隊首: three squads stage D, four boss-tax fixes (made after the G1-2 probe convicted them): the bucket floor counts only the head of the queue at full price (later buckets are not punished with it, the head's anti-ratchet stays; the ablation restores the v2 sum over all buckets); a scout being shot at = the mission is voided plus an avoidance cooldown (the ablation clings to the mission inside the tower ring); contested pre-emption is retired from the table (the ablation still grabs); a rally scattering below 40% = cancel rather than send a token wave, and offAcc is not dislodged (the ablation sorties and feeds the enemy) (causal control)
\\n[110] 真機回饋三修（2026-07-20 使用者）：天然資源點採集席: \n[110] three fixes from play-testing: a seat limit on gathering from natural resource nodes (shared across sides) + one seat on renewables and fish traps + a placement preview for fish traps + who controls the scout list (causal control)
資源點席位：同一天然點最多 NODE_CAP(5~8) 人同採·第 CAP+1: resource node seats: at most NODE_CAP (5~8) villagers gather from the same natural node; number CAP+1 cannot select it; **the seats are shared across sides** (an enemy villager is blocked by them too); free one seat and another fits in (causal control)
席位語意不誤判枯竭：自己人把天然點佔滿＝該資源對我仍「可採」(availRes: seat semantics must not be read as exhaustion: my own people filling a natural node = that resource is still \"gatherable\" to me (availRes true, so nothing downstream fires farms or the market); to the side with no seat = not gatherable
再生點維持一人一席：農田被佔＝第二個村民不選它（CAP 只放寬天然點·不放寬再生: renewables stay at one villager per seat: a farm already taken = a second villager does not select it (CAP relaxes natural nodes only, not renewables)
漁籠一次一船：天然漁場不限艘數(舊行為不動)·漁籠已有船在採＝第二艘不選·讓出即: fish traps take one boat at a time: natural fisheries are unlimited (old behaviour untouched); a trap already being worked = a second boat does not select it; free it and it can be (causal control)
漁籠選址：深水格可放·陸地/已有籠＝不可放·超出漁船 DEPLOY_R 範圍＝擋: fish trap placement: deep water is allowed; land or an existing trap is not; beyond the fishing boat's DEPLOY_R = blocked; inside the range the trap is placed
斥候列控制權（使用者 2026-07-20 真機回報「紅方斥候出現在我這邊·可以: who controls the scout list (from play-testing: \"the red scout showed up on my side and I could call it over and kill it\"): AI scouts share the scouts array but must **not** appear in the player's scout list = there is no channel to order them
\\n[111] 多地圖登錄表（2026-07-20 使用者「想要多幾張試玩的地: \n[111] the map registry (\"I want a few more maps to try, and the water map is old and a bit small\"): five maps at a uniform size + **strict left-right mirroring, map by map** (terrain, resources, opening positions) = the fairness clause, in hard form (there is form here: an enemy town centre hand-entered as 104 instead of 106 gave side 1 a near-100% win rate)
多地圖：五張圖（陸戰/水域/純擂台/平地經濟/地形）皆 128×72＝水圖已由: multiple maps: all five (land, water, pure arena, plains economy, terrain) are 128×72 = the water map has been scaled up from 64×36; every map has resource nodes
多地圖公平硬條款：逐圖**地形**嚴格左右鏡射（每一格 terr[x,y]===: map fairness clause: **terrain** is strictly mirrored left to right on every map (terr[x,y] === terr[TW-1-x,y] for every tile, 0 differences)
多地圖公平硬條款：逐圖**資源點**嚴格左右鏡射（每點在 W-x 有同型同量對應: map fairness clause: **resource nodes** are strictly mirrored left to right on every map (every node has a counterpart of the same type and amount at W-x)
多地圖起手位：敵方 TC ＝我方 TC 的嚴格 tile 鏡射（mirTx·TC: map opening positions: the enemy town centre is the strict tile mirror of the player's (mirTx; a 2×2 town centre = TW-tx-2); each side sits in its own half = the source of the old side bias is structurally closed off
\\n[112] 水軍三角閉合（2026-07-20 二次裁決）：戰船 rng: \n[112] closing the naval triangle: war galley range back to 150 (shore bombardment and attacking buildings belong to the siege ship; the feudal navy's job is blockade) + fire ship speed 104→90 (so the siege ship gets two volleys off and its splash catches massed fire ships) = the triangle closes on fleets alone
水軍：戰船 rng150＝與弓同射程（不壓岸）·對岸與攻建築歸投石船 rng24: navy: war galley rng 150 = the same reach as an archer (no shore dominance); shore bombardment and attacking buildings belong to the siege ship at rng 240, and even that cannot reach every shore defence
水軍三角力學：火船 sp90＝通過投石船有效帶(240-45)的時間拉長 16%: naval triangle mechanics: fire ship sp 90 = 16% longer inside the siege ship's effective band (240-45) (1.87 → 2.17s); the speed ladder fire > galley > siege is unchanged (the fire ship keeps its identity)
水軍反制鏈契約：火船對戰船加成在（火>戰）·投石船對建築加成在（攻城分工）: naval counter-chain contract: the fire ship's bonus against the war galley is present (fire > galley); the siege ship's bonus against buildings is present (the siege division of labour)
彈道契約：投石＝砸發射當下的地點（tx/ty·移動目標會閃掉）·弓箭＝追目標（t: projectile contract: a catapult hits the spot it fired at (tx/ty, so a moving target dodges); an arrow tracks its target (tgt) — this is the mechanical basis for \"the war galley kites the siege ship\"
站定齊射契約：長弓站定 ≥holdSec→傷害×holdDmg·移動即失效·非長: volley-while-stationary contract: a longbowman standing still for ≥holdSec deals damage ×holdDmg; moving cancels it; every other unit is always 1. The field is named holdDmg, not hold (hold = transport capacity, and the collision made uTick treat the unit as a boat, so it never engaged)
弓騎命中契約：acc 0.85（複驗定案）·與目標閃避**相乘**不取代·普弓無: horse archer accuracy contract: acc 0.85 (confirmed on re-check); it **multiplies** with the target's evasion rather than replacing it; the ordinary archer has no acc field; M8 remounts caps it at 1.0
\\n[113] 陣型同攻距移速細分（待決 7 殘項·2026-07-20 使用: \n[113] formation split by speed within the same reach: the band key = (reach, speed) = heavy infantry (sp58) forms its own rank in front of spearmen (sp70); reach is still the primary key (a ranged unit never ends up in front of melee just because it is fast)
陣型移速細分：同攻距 重步(sp58) 拆成獨立排、站在槍兵(sp70) 之前（: formation speed split: at the same reach, heavy infantry (sp58) splits into its own rank and stands in front of spearmen (sp70) (slow in front, fast behind)
陣型移速細分：攻距仍是主鍵（近戰>弓>長弓·弓騎攻距短雖快仍在弓之前）·同兵種同: formation speed split: reach is still the primary key (melee > archer > longbowman; the horse archer's short reach keeps it ahead of the archer despite its speed); same unit, same speed = same rank
\\n[114] 輕量首頁（2026-07-20 待決「首頁+存檔」上半）：裸載: \n[114] the lightweight home screen: it appears only on a bare load = zero disturbance to the existing entry points (this suite itself runs on ?noai=1, so the home screen must be hidden) + the menus are generated from the data tables + seed and TICK overrides are confined to spectator mode
首頁：有查詢參數的載入（harness/觀戰/分享連結）＝首頁隱藏且不凍結模擬（: home screen: a load with query parameters (harness, spectator, a shared link) = the home screen is hidden and the simulation is not frozen (zero disturbance to existing entry points)
首頁選單由資料表生成（地圖/難度/文明三表）·難度揭露文案與 ⚙️ 面板共用同一: the home screen menus are generated from the data tables (map, difficulty and civilisation); the difficulty disclosure text comes from the same function as the ⚙️ panel's (the boss's gathering ×1.2 is disclosed)
敵方文明可選性：困難以下可選·魔王/修羅/天神一律隨機（首頁與 ⚙️ 面板共用同: opponent civilisation selectability: choosable below Hard; boss, shura and god are always random (the home screen and the ⚙️ panel share the one rule, so you cannot reopen ⚙️ to get around it)
首頁無「我方文明」列（使用者撤下·遊戲內 📜 科技面板本來就能選）·`?civ=: the home screen has no \"my civilisation\" row (withdrawn; the in-game 📜 tech panel could already choose it); the `?civ=` URL escape hatch still works
\\n[115] 打帶跑：攻城器不再被 kite 凍住（使用者 2026-07-: \n[115] kiting: siege engines are no longer frozen by it (\"with hit-and-run on it never gets a shot off\") + backing-off fire ships from the factory (it failed arena acceptance) + the arena zeroes t/unitSeq at the start (determinism)
攻城器不吃打帶跑：投石車/投石船在 kite stance 下照常開火命中（舊碼: siege engines are exempt from kiting: catapults and siege ships fire and hit normally under the kite stance (the old code's !splash gate in the kite branch = zero output entirely)
退著打機制出廠關閉（KITE_RADIAL=false·擂台驗收未過＝破「火船剋: backing-off fire ships from the factory (KITE_RADIAL=false; it failed arena acceptance, breaking \"fire ship counters war galley\" from 100% to 57%); the threshold constants are under contract
擂台開場歸零 t/unitSeq＝同種子可重現（rAF 起跑線坑：實測同設定曾跑: the arena zeroes t/unitSeq at the start = the same seed reproduces (the rAF start-line trap: the same settings once produced 62% / 71% / 76% across three runs)
\\n[116] 村民來襲反應改制（2026-07-21 使用者裁決）：觸發＝「: \n[116] rewriting how villagers react to a raid: the trigger is \"an enemy combat unit within 4 tiles\" or \"currently being attacked\"; the standard response is to garrison (only a full or blocked building prevents it); the bell is an early warning
村民觸發半徑由射程推導：VILL_ALERT=3格(120·TILE=40)＝弓: the villager trigger radius is derived from weapon range: VILL_ALERT = 3 tiles (120, TILE=40) = the archer (3.75 tiles), longbowman (4.75) and catapult (5.9) **get one free shot** before the villagers wake up; the horse archer (2.95) sits just under the threshold = no free shot, it has to close with speed
無攻擊力單位不示警：敵醫者(dmg0) 不觸發村民停工（舊碼 8/8 全體停工）: units with no attack raise no alarm: an enemy medic (dmg 0) does not stop villagers working (the old code stopped all 8 of 8); a spearman with an attack still triggers it; the military nearestFoe is not subject to this gate
醫者速度契約：sp 78→70＝不快過它要照顧的槍/弓（支援兵不該跑在隊伍前面先: medic speed contract: sp 78 → 70 = no faster than the spearmen and archers it looks after (a support unit should not arrive at the fighting ahead of the line), but still no slower than heavy infantry = it does not fall behind
被打就跑＋「大家快跑」互傳：村民受傷標記 hurtT·VILL_SHOUT(15: run when hit, and pass \"everybody run\" along: a wounded villager is marked with hurtT and companions within VILL_SHOUT (150) go on alert too (the old code reacted to being hit not at all = a catapult outside the trigger ring shot them for free)
進駐到達判定用 footRectDist：2×2 建築的**斜角鄰格**算貼到（: garrison arrival uses footRectDist: a **diagonal neighbour** of a 2×2 building counts as touching it (the old 62px circular threshold could not reach the ≈70px diagonal = villagers bounced at the door, garrison peaked at 0/8)
自動釋放需躲滿 3 秒：突襲打外圍資源點時 TC 本身一直「安全」＝舊碼進駐當: automatic release requires 3 full seconds inside: when a raid hits an outlying resource node the town centre itself stays \"safe\", so the old code ejected them on the same tick they entered (an endless in-out loop); now it waits the full 3 seconds
\\n[117] A* open list 換二元堆（2026-07-21 效能: \n[117] swapping the A* open list for a binary heap: a pure data-structure replacement, and **the tie ordering must match the old linear scan**
二元堆 tie-break 契約：全平地直線求路仍回傳有效路徑且終點落在目標（同: binary heap tie-break contract: a straight-line query across open ground still returns a valid path ending on the target (if the tie ordering changed, the path would change and every simulation baseline would shift)
同一組起訖重複呼叫逐點一致＝堆狀態不跨呼叫殘留（每次呼叫自帶 heap/pos/: repeated calls for the same start and end agree point for point = no heap state survives between calls (each call brings its own heap/pos/seq)
decrease-key 正確：斜向路徑連續且每步相鄰（g 變小時 sift-u: decrease-key is correct: a diagonal path is continuous and every step adjacent (sift-up when g drops, no duplicate push = no breaks and no missing nodes)
走不到的目標＝不可吐出半條路（中空圍牆內的**可走**格：路徑必須連續且終點落在: an unreachable target must not yield half a path (for **walkable** tiles inside a hollow ring of wall: the path must be continuous and end outside the wall; since 2026-07-21 this falls back across components rather than returning an empty array)
\\n[118] chevauchée 焚田（D 案·2026-07-21 使用: \n[118] chevauchée (the horse archer burns the fields): a bonus against renewable resource buildings + MR ravaging; it **must not** spill over into a siege bonus or into automatic target selection
類別標記：農田/萌芽林/漁籠＝raid（可再生資源建築）·TC/城堡/牆/門/塔: category marking: farm, coppice and fish trap = raid (renewable resource buildings); town centre, castle, wall, gate, tower, barracks, market and dock are not (a chevauchée goes around the castle)
弓騎對農田吃 raid 2.5·對 TC 仍是 1（沒有 building 通用: the horse archer gets raid 2.5 against a farm and still 1 against a town centre (there is no general building bonus, so it does not turn into a siege unit competing with the catapult)
不外溢：騎兵打田仍 1（無 raid 欄）·投石車照舊 building×3、對: no spill-over: cavalry still deal 1 to a farm (no raid field); the catapult still has building ×3 and ×siege 2 = 6 against walls (the siege bonus is untouched)
MR 打草穀＝放大器：未研發 raidDmg=1（中性）·研發後 1.5＝弓騎對: MR ravaging is an amplifier: unresearched raidDmg = 1 (neutral); researched 1.5 = the horse archer's 2.5 against farms becomes 3.75 (burning 8 outlying fields 23.5s → 18.0s, re-measured after buildings were exempted from acc)
MR 是蒙古★·馬廄研·前置 UM（沒有弓騎就研不了）·且**不在** AI 研: MR is a Mongol ★, researched at the stable, with UM as its prerequisite (no horse archers, no research), and is deliberately **absent** from the AI's research line (the AI has no burn-the-fields decision, so it is left to the ML target-selection round)
弓騎選敵排序＝槍1.4>兵1.0>田0.9>其他建築0.6>村民0.5>塔/城堡: horse archer target priority = spear 1.4 > units 1.0 > fields 0.9 > other buildings 0.6 > villagers 0.5 > tower, castle and town centre 0.15 (fields sit below units, so it will not stand burning a field while a spearman closes and stabs it)
pick 只給弓騎：騎兵仍是 田0.6/村民1.0/塔0.75/兵1.0·投石車: pick is given to the horse archer only: cavalry still see fields 0.6 / villagers 1.0 / towers 0.75 / units 1.0; the catapult's building ×3 lookup still comes first (towers are 3 as well); no other unit has a pick field
\\n[119] 建築免命中稅（2026-07-21 使用者「打田還能打不中也不: \n[119] buildings are exempt from the accuracy tax (\"it is a bit odd to miss a field\"): acc is the **shooter's** tax for firing on the move, and is not charged against something that cannot move
弓騎射建築 200 箭零落空（穀倉不會閃箭·acc 只在目標是建築時視為 1）: a horse archer firing 200 arrows at a building misses none (a granary does not dodge; acc counts as 1 whenever the target is a building)
對「單位」的移動射擊稅沒被誤刪：同樣 200 箭射站定槍兵仍有落空（0.97×0: the moving-fire tax against *units* was not deleted with it: the same 200 arrows at a stationary spearman still miss some (0.97 × 0.85, ~35 expected)
\\n[120] 判準統一（standOK/foeGate）＋通行分量（path: \n[120] one shared predicate (standOK/foeGate) + connectivity components (pathCompL/W): the structural defence against the gate-tile bug
standOK 與 canStep 逐格同義（平地/建築/我方門/敵方門/深水/: standOK and canStep agree tile for tile (open ground, buildings, my gate, an enemy gate, deep water, shallows, high ground, ramps × side × dom) — the direct defence against the gate-tile bug
foeGate 是敵門的唯一定義：gateMask-1!==side 才算敵門（: foeGate is the only definition of an enemy gate: it counts only when gateMask-1 !== side (my own gate does not block me, and does block the other side)
±3 終點吸附的觸發條件＝canStep 的答案：以**敵方城門格**為終點時求: the ±3 endpoint snap triggers exactly when canStep says so: a path is found with an **enemy gate tile** as the destination (the old code flooded the whole map and returned an empty array, leaving the unit standing still)
我方城門不受影響：以自家門格為終點仍直接走上去（統一判準不得把己方門一起擋掉）: my own gate is unaffected: a path to my own gate tile still walks straight onto it (unifying the predicate must not block friendly gates along with enemy ones)
通行分量：中空圍牆圍出的口袋自成一分量（landComp 做不到這件事＝它不看: connectivity components: a pocket enclosed by a hollow ring of wall forms its own component (landComp cannot do this — it does not look at blocked)
分量健全性（充分條件）：不同分量 ⇒ 照抄 A* 規則的 BFS 也真的到不了（: component soundness (a sufficient condition): different components ⇒ a BFS copying the A* rules exactly really cannot get there (it may only under-estimate the barrier, never over-estimate it)
跨區備援：走不到時不再回空陣列＝改走「離**目標點**最近的己方分量格」（202: cross-component fallback: unreachable no longer returns an empty array = it walks to the tile of its own component nearest the **target point** (units no longer stand still)
跨區備援的末點不可被覆寫回走不到的座標（否則最後一步又指回去＝原地推牆）: the cross-component fallback's final point must not be overwritten back to the unreachable coordinate (or the last step points back at it = shoving the wall in place)
診斷計數 dbg.pathStats().xr 會跳＝「走不到」在 debug: the dbg.pathStats().xr counter moves = \"could not get there\" is visible in debug (as requested: a safety net is fine, as long as you can see it working)
淺灘同時掛在陸表與水表·深水不入陸表·純陸地不入水表（共用一張表會把陸海接成一塊: shallows appear in both the land and water tables; deep water is not in the land table and dry land is not in the water table (one shared table would join land and sea into a single mass and destroy the components entirely)
\\n[121] M7 蹄鐵·衝鋒作用面＝「騎乘兵」（2026-07-21 使用: \n[121] M7 horseshoes: the charge bonus applies to \"mounted\" units (\"it should buff every cavalry type, horse archers included\") + enemy command UI does not leak
M7 作用面以 UT.mount 宣告：騎兵/弓騎有、步兵系沒有（不再用 typ: M7's scope is declared by UT.mount: cavalry and horse archers have it, the infantry line does not (no longer hard-coded against the type string)
M7 研發後弓騎移速 ×1.2（本輪修的那條·使用者「應該要對所有騎兵類加成，包: after M7 the horse archer's speed is ×1.2 (the fix this round: \"it should buff every cavalry type, horse archers included\")
M7 對騎兵維持 ×1.2、對步兵/弓兵零影響（沒有順手加速別人）: M7 still gives cavalry ×1.2 and has no effect on infantry or archers (nothing else was sped up along the way)
相對關係不翻轉：對稱研 M7 後騎兵仍快於弓騎（「騎兵剋弓騎＝脫不了離」是設計意: the relationship does not invert: with M7 researched on both sides, cavalry are still faster than horse archers (\"cavalry counter horse archers because they cannot disengage\" is the design intent)
敵方 nudge 拉動線不畫（2026-07-21 使用者「我看得到紅方的拉動路: enemy nudge drag lines are not drawn (\"I can see the red side's drag paths, even outside my vision = cheating\")
敵方建築的生產佇列 ×N 不畫（「正在生產的兵」屬不可看到·敵方面板早已只在觀戰: the ×N production queue badge on enemy buildings is not drawn (\"what is in production\" is not something you may see; the enemy panel already showed queues only in spectator mode)
這條洩漏路徑是真的：敵方單位確實會被設 nudge（卡兵自救 unstick/d: the leak was real: enemy units genuinely do get nudge set (the stuck-unit rescue in unstick/dbgScan sets it for both sides)
\\n[122] 💾 存檔快照（狀態式·非重播式）：往返一致＋別名不斷＋**存檔: \n[122] 💾 save snapshots (state, not replay): the round trip agrees + aliases survive + **running on after saving = running on after loading**
存檔可 JSON 化（循環參照被登錄簿拆開）＋不含 DOM 參照；世界確實有內容: the save is JSON-serialisable (the registries break the circular references) and holds no DOM references; the test only runs once the world genuinely has content in it (construction sites, production queues and research all present)
唯一存不了的東西＝AI 承諾集的 exec/gate 閉包（且確實有·不是空過）: the one thing that cannot be saved = the exec/gate closures in the AI's commitment set (and they really are there, so the check is not passing vacuously); hang a closure on any other piece of state and this goes red
讀檔接回同一個世界：時間/單位/村民/建築數全部回到存檔當下: loading returns the same world: time, units, villagers and building counts all back to the moment of the save
別名不斷①資源/軍團/科技：const stock・const tags・pla: aliases survive ① resources, groups and tech: const stock, const tags, playerTech and techMod still point at the live objects under SIDES[0]
別名不斷②AI 腦與文明：aiMil===AIS[1]；SIDES[0].civ: aliases survive ② the AI brains and civilisations: aiMil === AIS[1]; SIDES[0].civ is the **same row** in CIVS, not a deep copy
指標重接：村民的資源點/單位的軍團/駐軍建築/攻擊目標都是陣列裡的那一個（不是複: pointers are relinked: a villager's resource node, a unit's group, its garrison building and its attack target are all the object in the array, not a copy of it
**確定性**：存檔後直接跑 1200 步 vs 讀檔後跑 1200 步＝世界指: **determinism**: 1,200 ticks straight after saving vs 1,200 ticks after loading = identical world fingerprints (miss any piece of state and it diverges here)
靈敏度對照：同一份快照只把亂數狀態挪一格＝指紋就變（證明上一項的「一致」不是指紋: sensitivity control: shifting only the RNG state in the same snapshot changes the fingerprint (proving the previous assertion's \"identical\" is not the fingerprint failing to see anything)
存檔大小在 localStorage 配額內（單檔 < 1MB＝三個槽位放得下·: the save fits inside the localStorage quota (under 1MB per file = three slots fit; iOS allows 5MB per origin)
\\n[123] 📂 首頁讀檔入口：面板要浮在首頁之上（可視+可點）＋首頁唯讀（: \n[123] 📂 the home screen's load entry: the panel has to float above the home screen (visible and clickable) + the home screen is read-only (it must not overwrite a save)
首頁「📂 讀取存檔」有接線，且面板疊在首頁之上（z 85 > 80）: the home screen's \"📂 Load a save\" is wired up, and the panel stacks above the home screen (z 85 > 80)
遮擋實測：面板標題/內容/✕ 三處 elementFromPoint 都落在面板: occlusion, measured: elementFromPoint at the panel's title, body and ✕ all land inside the panel (= it really is visible and clickable, not merely un-hidden by a class)
首頁＝唯讀：不畫 💾 存鈕、snapSave 直接擋（首頁背後是還沒開局的預設局: the home screen is read-only: no 💾 save buttons are drawn and snapSave refuses outright (behind the home screen is an unstarted default game, and a misclick would overwrite a real save)
唯讀旗標關得掉：遊戲內開面板 💾 每格都在（沒有把存檔功能一併鎖死）: the read-only flag can be cleared: opening the panel in game shows 💾 on every slot (the save feature was not locked out along with it)
